name: trib-search
description: Unified search plugin with raw search, AI search, scrape, map, crawl, and usage tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Unified raw search, AI search, scrape, map, and crawl tools.
interface.longDescription: Bundle reusable web search and content retrieval workflows for TRIBGAMES across Claude Code and Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use trib-search to search the web and summarize the top findings.
Use trib-search to scrape a page or crawl a documentation section.
